title: Verisk Names Elizabeth Mann Chief Financial Officer
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., July 21, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK) today announced that Elizabeth Mann has been named executive vice president and chief financial officer for Verisk, effective September 15, 2022.

title: Verisk to Announce Fiscal Second-Quarter 2022 Results on August 2, 2022
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., July 13, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics provider, will report its financial results for the fiscal second quarter ended June 30, 2022, on Tuesday, August 2, 2022, after the market close. The press release, with accompanying financial information, will be posted on the Verisk investor website at http://investor.verisk.com.

title: Scott Stephenson Joins Buckle as Chairman of the Board
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #BoardofDirectors--Buckle announces that Scott Stephenson, former chairman, president, and chief executive officer of Verisk, has joined its Board of Directors.

title: American Farmers & Ranchers Mutual Insurance Company to Streamline Claims Handling with Verisk's Solutions
text: Insurer harnesses Verisk's innovative full-cycle ecosystem of solutions to facilitate efficient, effective claims processing Insurer harnesses Verisk's innovative full-cycle ecosystem of solutions to facilitate efficient, effective claims processing

title: Insurers, Adjusters and Contractors Can Benchmark Performance Against Trends with Verisk's 2021 Property Report
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J. , July 05, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- As volatile construction costs persist, a historical view of trends paired with up-to-date pricing better equips insurers, adjusters and contractors to understand the impact of these costs on losses. Verisk's 2021 Property Report for the United States provides insights into property insurance trends for benchmarking.

title: Insurers, Adjusters and Contractors Can Benchmark Performance Against Trends with Verisk's 2021 Property Report for Canada
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J. , July 05, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- As volatile construction costs persist, a historical view of trends paired with up-to-date pricing better equips insurers, adjusters and contractors to understand the impact of these costs on losses. Verisk's 2021 Property Report for Canada provides insights into property insurance trends for benchmarking.

title: Verisk Names Tim Rayner President of Specialty Business Solutions
text: LONDON, July 01, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics provider, today announced that Tim Rayner has been named president of the company's Specialty Business Solutions group (formerly known as Sequel), effective immediately.
